_provenance: SYNTHETIC / ADVERSARIAL. Not an official capture and NOT producible by the real services/api app: a transport-level upstream 5xx is retried and mapped to state=source_unavailable (503), and state=no_match is only ever emitted at HTTP 404. This file records the INCOHERENT (HTTP 500, state=no_match) status/state pair deliberately, so M2-T002's client can be regression-tested to NEVER trust a no_match body that arrives with a non-404 status. It exists because a misbehaving proxy, CDN, or future middleware could theoretically produce this pair; the client contract is that the (status, state) pair must be coherent per the documented STATUS_STATE_MATRIX (services/api/app/api/v1/properties.py) and an incoherent pair is treated as a hard error, never rendered as a legitimate no-match result.
_consumed_by: M2-T002 (apps/web) as a client regression input; wire this fixture into the web-e2e / vitest client transport there. This task (M2-T003) is READ-ONLY on apps/web and only records the artifact.

response_body.message: No PLUTO record exists for BBL 5999999999 in dataset 64uk-42ks. The BBL is syntactically valid but matches no tax lot in the current PLUTO release (or the lot is represented under a different BBL, e.g. after merger - see appbbl semantics).
